statement: In every magma, Equation 2713 (`x = ((y * x) * (y * z)) * y`) implies Equation 2803 (`x = ((y * z) * (y * w)) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0062
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op y z)) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y z) (op y w)) u)
